title: Zero-Shot Text-to-Image Generation
authors: Aditya Ramesh, Mikhail Pavlov, Gabriel Goh, Scott Gray et al.
hook: Type a sentence, and see a machine imagine a picture from scratch.
promise: You will understand how DALL-E links words to images using discrete visual tokens and transformers.
prerequisite_note: Bring a sense of how language models predict the next word in a sentence.

glossary.plain: Generating outputs for prompts never seen during training, with no extra fine-tuning.
A neural network that compresses images into a sequence of tokens, like turning pictures into a visual alphabet.
A model that generates data one token at a time, using everything it has seen so far.
Creating pictures based on written descriptions.
A basic unit of data, such as a word or a chunk of an image.
Involving more than one type of data, like text and images together.

cards.title: Words Become Pictures
body: Discover how DALL-E lets language steer image creation through clever token-based modeling.

cards.title: From Sentences to Scenes
body: Imagine describing a scene to a friend and having them paint it instantly. DALL-E tries to do this, but with machines.
Instead of memorizing pictures, DALL-E learns to connect language and images, so it can invent new scenes from just your words.

cards.title: How Text Becomes an Image
body: First, DALL-E turns your sentence and an image into short sequences of tokens, like a language for pictures.
Then, a transformer model learns to predict the next token, mixing text and image tokens together in a single stream.
Finally, when given a new sentence, DALL-E generates new image tokens, which are decoded back into a picture.
cards.left: Text and image are split into tokens
cards.middle: Transformer predicts next token in mixed sequence
cards.right: Tokens are decoded into a new image
cards.caption: DALL-E stitches together language and vision by treating both as sequences of tokens.

cards.title: How DALL-E Differs From Old Approaches
body: Compare traditional image generators with DALL-E's token-based, zero-shot approach.
cards.offNote: Needs labeled data or extra information, struggles with new concepts.
cards.onNote: Combines text and images as tokens, invents new scenes from pure description.

cards.title: One Stream, Two Worlds
body: The central trick: treat words and pieces of images as the same type of token, mixing them in one long sequence.
This lets a single transformer model learn the rules of both language and vision, so it can generate images from text alone.

cards.title: How Scale Changes DALL-E's Imagination
body: Adjust the amount of training data and model size to see how DALL-E's creativity and accuracy shift.
cards.low: Struggles to match text and images, makes blurry or mismatched pictures.
cards.mid: Some matching, can handle common objects but misses fine details.
cards.high: Sharp, creative images that closely follow text prompts, even for unusual scenes.

cards.title: Pick DALL-E's Key Ingredients
body: Select the essential parts that let DALL-E turn words into images.

choices.label: Text encoder
choices.note: Converts sentences into tokens the model can use.

choices.label: Discrete VAE
choices.note: Compresses images into a sequence of visual tokens.

choices.label: Autoregressive transformer
choices.note: Learns to predict the next token in the sequence.

choices.label: Large paired dataset
choices.note: Provides many examples of matching text and images.

choices.label: Token mixing
choices.note: Combines text and image tokens in one stream.

choices.label: Zero-shot evaluation
choices.note: Tests the model on prompts it has never seen before.

cards.title: DALL-E's Surprising Results
body: DALL-E could invent images for text prompts it had never seen, rivaling or beating older models on creativity and relevance.
Its zero-shot ability showed that merging text and image tokens let one model generalize to new ideas without extra training.

bars.label: Zero-shot accuracy
bars.note: Matches text to images never seen during training

bars.label: Sample diversity
bars.note: Creates many different images for one prompt

bars.label: Image quality
bars.note: Sharpness and realism of generated images

cards.caption: DALL-E set a new bar for zero-shot text-to-image generation.

cards.title: Why DALL-E Changed the Game
body: DALL-E proved that a single model could learn to connect language and vision, simply by predicting tokens in sequence.
This idea inspired a wave of new research, making text-driven image generation a practical and creative tool.

recap.label: Tokenize
recap.note: Turn text and images into sequences of tokens.

recap.label: Mix
recap.note: Combine text and image tokens in one stream.

recap.label: Predict
recap.note: Use a transformer to generate new tokens.

recap.label: Decode
recap.note: Turn image tokens back into a picture.

cards.title: Zero-Shot Text-to-Image Generation
body: To dive deeper, explore the full paper and see DALL-E's results and architecture in detail.
